title: iPhone 14 Pro
review:
This app is a joke. 

While I don’t mind not having a free trial, I should at least be able to subscribe. 

The purchase window is too large for the screen. I can tap on the first two options, an annual and weekly subscription, but that’s it. Must be another button “below” the screen that is inaccessible on my phone so it removes my ability to “Okay” the subscription. 

Oh well, the interface is pretty though
